title: Golden Globes 2026: Complete Winners Overview
text: The 83rd Golden Globe Awards ceremony took place on January 11, 2026, at The Beverly Hilton in Beverly Hills, California, with Nikki Glaser hosting for the second consecutive year. Best Motion Picture — Musical or Comedy: One Battle After Another (Paul Thomas Anderson's celebrated action thriller). Best Director: Paul Thomas Anderson for One Battle After Another. Best Motion Picture — Drama: Hamnet (directed by Chloé Zhao). Leading performances recognized included Timothée Chalamet winning Best Male Actor in a Musical or Comedy for Marty Supreme, and Jessie Buckley earning Best Female Actor in a Drama for Hamnet. Wagner Moura claimed the Best Male Actor in Drama category for The Secret Agent. Television Highlights: The White Lotus dominated television categories with six nominations, while Adolescence claimed five awards after its Emmy success. The ceremony introduced a new "Podcast of the Year" category, with "Good Hang With Amy Poehler" as the inaugural winner. Best TV Series — Drama: The Pitt. Best TV Series — Comedy: The Studio. Best Limited Series: Adolescence. The event celebrated achievements across animation, international cinema, and emerging platforms, reflecting evolving entertainment landscapes.
